title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is a framework that triggers AI coding workflows from Jira, GitHub, Slack, Telegram, and Discord. The video demonstrates building a Jira adapter that automatically fixes bugs, opens pull requests, and updates tickets based on AI-driven workflows with dedicated per-ticket conversations.
